hypothesis: Yield density as additive component decorrelates from centrality, changes seed set
method: Parse 1158 lessons, build citation DAG. Compute per-lesson yield density (total/sqrt(pairs)). Compare seed sets.
expect: Top-10 change >=30 pct; DNA coverage >=6 pct
actual: Top-10 Jaccard 0.818 (1 swap). Top-20 Jaccard 0.538 (6 swaps, 30 pct). DNA no change.
diff: Top-10 change FALSE (10 pct). Top-20 CONFIRMED (30 pct). DNA FALSE. L-1196 (L5, zero citations) surfaces on bridge quality.
